chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1891 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case (Priority) 1.For hearing of CMA 7500/25 2.For hearing of main case 24-11-2025 Mr. Asadullah Soomro, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Naveed Ahmed Shah, D.A.G a/w Suhail Ahmed, I.O/S.I, FIA Crime & AHT, Sukkur. **** Learned DAG files statement on behalf of I.O, FIA Crime & AHT Circle, Sukkur, taken on record and copy whereof is provided to counsel for the petitioner, who under instructions, does not press instant petition, which is accordingly disposed of as not pressed along with listed application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
